name: PAPA JOHNS INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: PART I General Papa Johns International, Inc., a Delaware corporation (referred to as the Company, Papa Johns, Papa Johns or in the first person notations of we, us and our), operates and franchises pizza delivery and carryout restaurants and, in certain international markets, dine-in and delivery restaurants under the trademark Papa Johns. Papa Johns began operations in 1984. At December28, 2025, there were 6,083 Papa Johns restaurants in operation, consisting of 475 Company-owned and 5,608 fra...
